template.name: testclass
abstractclass
template.description: Abstract class - direct instantiation throws RuntimeError

template.name: abstractmethod
template.description: Abstract method - subclasses must override or class becomes abstract

template.name: interfacedefault
template.description: Interface with property and default method body

template.name: assertThrows
template.description: Assert that a no-arg callable raises

template.name: deprecated
template.description: @deprecated marker for a function, method, or class

template.name: memoize
template.description: @memoize a pure top-level function (caches results by args)

template.name: fromimport
template.description: Bind selected symbols from a module

template.name: module
template.description: Module declaration with init block (imperative setup goes inside init in module files)

template.name: init
template.description: init { ... } - one-shot setup at module load time

template.name: export
template.description: Export a function from a module

template.name: genericfunc
template.description: Generic function with one type parameter

template.name: genericinterface
template.description: Generic function where T must satisfy an interface

template.name: genericlambda
template.description: Anonymous function whose T resolves to the outer generic frame

template.name: typetest
template.description: Reified runtime type test - call as fn<int>(x) and the body sees T = int

template.name: functools
template.description: Common functools idioms - pipe and memoize

template.name: asyncrate
asyncall
template.description: Wait for every task; cancel siblings on first failure

template.name: asyncrace
template.description: Return the first task to finish; cancel the rest

template.name: asynctimeout
template.description: Cancel a task if it does not complete in time

template.name: asynccancel
template.description: Cancel a running task (alias for async.cancel(task))

template.name: aesencrypt
template.description: Encrypt with AES-256-GCM (key must be 32 bytes)

template.name: chacha20encrypt
template.description: Encrypt with XChaCha20-Poly1305 (key must be 32 bytes)

template.name: rematch
template.description: Match a regex and read capture groups via .text / .groups / .named

template.name: httpsession
template.description: Reusable HTTP client with a cookie jar and base URL

template.name: schedtimer
template.description: Fire a callback once after N ms (cancellable)

template.name: schedticker
template.description: Fire a callback every N ms until stopped

template.name: tobase
template.description: Format an int in base 2-36 and parse one back

template.name: binarypack
template.description: Pack/unpack a binary record (Python struct-style format)

template.name: passwordhash
template.description: PHP-compatible password hash + verify (defaults to bcrypt $2y$)

template.name: httpproxy
template.description: HTTP client routed through an explicit proxy

template.name: stopwatch
template.description: Measure elapsed time with time.now and time.elapsed

template.name: trycatch
template.description: Try/catch block with typed exception parameter

template.name: statictyped
template.description: Mutable class-level field with declared type

template.name: destructor
template.description: Class destructor; runs at program exit or on `del x` (end-of-lifetime hook, NOT tied to `with`)

template.name: del
template.description: Retire a binding: fires the class destructor (if any) inline and removes the name; subsequent use is a static error

template.name: with
template.description: Context-manager block: invokes __enter__() on entry and __exit__() on exit (any exit path)

template.name: contextmgr
iter
reflectloc
template.value: let loc = reflect.location($target$); io.println(loc["module"] + ":" + (loc["line"] as string));$END$
template.description: Get the source position of a function or class as {module, line, column} (1.0.6)

template.name: csvparse
template.description: csv.parse: parse CSV text into a list of cell-list rows

template.name: csvdict
template.description: csv.parseDict: parse CSV with first row as headers; returns list of dicts

template.name: stringbuilder
template.description: strings.StringBuilder: amortised O(n) accumulator for tight-loop string assembly

template.name: streamsopen
template.description: streams.open: file-backed stream wrapper; iterating yields lines (1.1.0 F3)

template.name: streamsmem
template.description: streams.memory: in-memory read/write stream wrapper (1.1.0 F3)

template.name: streamscopy
template.description: streams.copy: pipes from src.__read into dst.__write (1.1.0 F3)

template.name: watchstart
template.description: watch.start: register an fsnotify watcher with a callback (1.1.0 F5)

template.name: watchrecursive
procspawn
template.description: proc.spawn: start a child process and capture stdout (1.1.0 F4)

template.name: procpty
template.description: proc.spawn with pty: true; stdin/stdout share the master fd (1.1.0 F4)

template.name: socketsserve
template.description: sockets.serve: TCP server with accept handler (1.2.0)

template.name: progressbar
ffisymbol
template.description: ffi.Library.symbol: declare a C function signature (1.6.0)

template.name: ffihandle
template.description: ffi: wrap a C handle in a Geblang class with destructor (1.6.0)

template.name: llmembed
template.description: llm: embed text into a vector

template.name: messagingsns
template.description: messaging.topic AWS SNS topic (subscribe via paired SQS queue)
